svg.aria-label: drv_usart.c API：硬件初始化、device 注册、兼容完整 init
svg.title: drv_usart.c API split
svg.desc: drv_usart_hw_init -> 硬件动作 (down). drv_usart_full_init -> drv_usart_hw_init (right side). drv_usart_full_init -> drv_usart_register (right side). Left column: hw_init over 硬件动作; middle: register; right: full_init.

text.font-family: Microsoft YaHei, Noto Sans CJK SC, Segoe UI, Arial, sans-serif
